fire_resist.title: Brew Fire Resistance potions (minimum 4) for the Ender Dragon fight

power_bow.title: Enchant a bow with Power IV or higher for End Crystal destruction from range

drag_food.title: Prepare high-tier food for the dragon fight — the battle drains hunger rapidly

subtitle.text: You have been preparing for this since Ch01. That doesn't make it less dangerous.

description: The Ender Dragon fight has three phases: approach, crystal destruction, and direct combat.
- Bow with Power IV minimum for range shots
- Beds explode in the End — place and activate near crystal bases
- TNT is an option but slower
- Caged crystals require climbing or grappling up the pillar
- Dragon breath leaves acid clouds — do not stand in them
- The dragon charges at the portal fountain — position to avoid
- The fight takes several minutes minimum
